Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class DescribeQuickActionResult

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.DescribeQuickActionResult
public class DescribeQuickActionResult extends Object

Java class for DescribeQuickActionResult complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DescribeQuickActionResult">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="accessLevelRequired" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ShareAccessLevel"/>
         <element name="actionEnumOrId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="canvasApplicationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID"/>
         <element name="canvasApplicationName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="colors" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}DescribeColor" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="contextSobjectType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="defaultValues" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}DescribeQuickActionDefaultValue" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="flowDevName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="flowRecordIdVar" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="height" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="iconName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="iconUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="icons" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}DescribeIcon" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="layout" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}DescribeLayoutSection"/>
         <element name="lightningComponentBundleId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID"/>
         <element name="lightningComponentBundleName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lightningComponentQualifiedName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lightningWebComponentBundleId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID"/>
         <element name="lightningWebComponentBundleName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lightningWebComponentQualifiedName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="miniIconUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="mobileExtensionId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="showQuickActionLcHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="showQuickActionVfHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="targetParentField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="targetRecordTypeId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID"/>
         <element name="targetSobjectType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="visualforcePageName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="visualforcePageUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="width" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getColors

      public List<DescribeColor> getColors()
      Gets the value of the colors property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the colors property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getColors().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DescribeColor

      Returns:
      The value of the colors property.

    • getDefaultValues

      public List<DescribeQuickActionDefaultValue> getDefaultValues()
      Gets the value of the defaultValues property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the defaultValues property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getDefaultValues().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DescribeQuickActionDefaultValue

      Returns:
      The value of the defaultValues property.

    • getIcons

      public List<DescribeIcon> getIcons()
      Gets the value of the icons property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the icons property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getIcons().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list DescribeIcon

      Returns:
      The value of the icons property.
